## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 🏗️ Infrastructure / DevOps change
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional changes)

---

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's ESLint & Prettier standards (`nx affected --target=lint` passes locally)
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests for new functionality
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`nx affected --target=test` passes)
- [ ] The project builds without errors (`nx affected --target=build --configuration=production`)

### Review
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented on complex or non-obvious logic
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README, architecture.md, erd_api_docs.md)

### Security
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials are committed
- [ ] New dependencies have been reviewed for known CVEs
- [ ] Input validation has been implemented where applicable
